extracted_metrics.forensic_reasoning_log: The auditor's report (Annexure to the Auditor's Report, page 93) explicitly states that the company has not incurred cash losses in the current and immediately preceding financial year.
extracted_metrics.verbatim_source_text: (x) The Company has no accumulated losses at the end of the financial year and it has not incurred cash losses in the current and immediately preceding financial year.
